debug_info.goal:
case refine_1
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
this : @S b = true
c : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∨
    (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩

failed_attempts: simpa [eval, stubbornness, Dist.switch, h_s] using h_true

simp only [not_or, this] at h
              have h_not_in : (b, true) ∉ resultSet a S ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ := by
                simp [resultSet, ra, h, this]
              have h_equiv : equiv a (S, ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) (S.switch b, ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) := by
                simp [equiv, Dist.switch, this]
                constructor
                · induction σ generalizing S
                  · simp [equiv, Dist.switch, this]
                  · unfold equiv; simp_all [Dist.switch, roleOfIn, resultSet, contribSet]; tauto
                · simp [contribSet, roleOfIn, resultSet, Dist.switch, this]
                  intro T τ he hrole hcontrib
                  aesop
              have h_eval := a_knows_after_t (S.switch b) ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ h_equiv
              simp [eval, stubbornness, Dist.switch, this] at h_eval

simp [eval, resultSet, roleOfIn, this] at h_in ⊢
              exact h_in.1.1

simp [eval, stubbornness] at h_knows
              by_contra h_not
              simp [Set.mem_union, not_or] at h_not
              aesop
sorry

have h := true_of_knowledge a_knows_after_t
              simp [eval, resultSet, roleOfIn] at h
              rw [this]
              exact h.1.1
simp [eval, stubbornness, Dist.switch, this] at h_eval
simp_all

sorry -- This should use the fact that a did not know b's secret before.
                · simp [ra, Error.roleOfIn, contribSet, resultSet, h, Dist.switch]
              have h_know := a_knows_after_t (S.switch b) ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ h_equi.2.symm
              simp [eval, stubbornness, Dist.switch] at h_know
sorry

simp [eval, resultSet, ra] at h
              exact h.1.1
simpa [eval, resultSet, roleOfIn, this] using h

simp only [Set.mem_union, not_or] at h
              have h_equi : Error.equi a (S, ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) (Error.Dist.switch b S, ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) := by
                refine ⟨rfl, ?_⟩
                unfold equiv
                simp [roleOfIn, Error.Dist.switch, h, this, contribSet, stubbornness, not_notMem_resultSet]
              have h_not_eval : ¬ Error.eval n (Error.Dist.switch b S) ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩ (Has b (b, true)) := by
                simp [eval, stubbornness, Error.Dist.switch]
              exact h_not_eval (a_knows_after_t _ _ (by simp) h_equi.2)

have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp [resultSet, this] at h ⊢
              exact h.1.1

simp only [not_or] at h
              apply a_not_know_before_t
              intro T τ same_len equ
              have ba : b ≠ a := by rintro rfl; have := know_your_own S σ; aesop
              have bc : b ≠ c := by rintro rfl; have := stubbornness (σ.length) σ rfl S (S b) b; aesop
              let T_switch := T.switch b
              have sl : (Call.normal a c :: σ).length = (Call.normal a c :: τ).length := by simp [same_len]
              have equ' : equiv a (S, ⟨Call.normal a c :: σ, o⟩) (T_switch, ⟨Call.normal a c :: τ, by simp [same_len]⟩) := by
                unfold equiv; simp [ra, same_len]; refine ⟨equ, ?_, ?_⟩
                · rfl
                · unfold contribSet; simp [Call.pair]
                  have : (T, τ) ~_c (T_switch, τ) := by
                    constructor; rfl
                    unfold equiv; induction τ
                    case nil => simp [equiv, Dist.switch]; rintro rfl; exact bc
                    case cons => unfold equiv; aesop
                  rw [indistinguishable_then_same_values this]
              have := a_knows_after_t T_switch ⟨Call.normal a c :: τ, by simp [same_len]⟩ sl equ'
              simp [eval, stubbornness] at this
              have : T_switch b = ! T b := by simp [T_switch, Dist.switch]
              have : T b = true := by
                have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                have := a_knows_after_t T ⟨Call.normal a c :: τ, by simp [same_len]⟩ sl
                unfold equiv at this; simp [ra, same_len, equ] at this
                have : (T, τ) ~_c (T, τ) := ⟨rfl, equiv_refl⟩
                specialize this (indistinguishable_then_same_values this) rfl
                simp [eval, stubbornness] at this; exact this
              simp_all

simp [eval, resultSet, this] at h_eval ⊢
              exact h_eval.1.1

sorry
                simp [contribSet, h_a, h_c]
              have h_knows := a_knows_after_t T ⟨⌜Call.normal a c⌝ :: τ.1, by rw [← τ.2]; exact o⟩ h_equiv
              have := true_of_knowldege h_knows
              rw [stubbornness] at this
              · simp [this]
              · simp [OSequence.length]

simp [eval, resultSet, ra] at h
              rw [‹S b = true›] at h
              exact h.1.1

sorry
          rw [this]
          exact h_eval

sorry -- Callee's contribution is also indistinguishable
              have h_knows := (Error.equiv_then_know_same (Error.equiv_of_equi h_equi) (Has b (b, true))).mp a_knows_after_t
              have h_true := Error.true_of_knowldege h_knows
              simp [eval, stubbornness, Dist.switch] at h_true
simp [eval, stubbornness, Dist.switch] at this

have h_truth := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp [eval, resultSet, ra] at h_truth
              exact this ▸ h_truth.1.1

simp [eval, resultSet, roleOfIn] at h
              rw [this]
              exact h.1.1

simp [eval, resultSet, roleOfIn, this] at h
